full_text:
Yuan Ji 袁基
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Ji (袁基)was born in Ruyang county, Runan commandery. Older brother of Yuan Shao and executed by Dong Zhuo for that relation. Yuan Ji was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Dong Zhuo. Yuan Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
